zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Grizzell於1632年7月18日出生在英國薩默塞特朋迪斯福德時，她的父親William Humphrey Grizzell32歲，母親Lucretia Christine Ripley28歲。她於1650年與Robert Coleman在美國維吉尼亞州艾可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1700年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪查爾斯 希迪 波特享年68歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州韓諾福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Grizzell于1632年7月18日出生在英国薩默塞特朋迪斯福德时，她的父亲William Humphrey Grizzell32岁，母亲Lucretia Christine Ripley28岁。她于1650年与Robert Coleman在美国弗吉尼亚州艾可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1700年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪查爾斯 希迪 波特享年68岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州韓諾福。

nameMeanings.name: Grizzell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Grizzle   2, 3. Compare   Grizzel  .
Variant of   Grizzle   1, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Grizzle
meanings: Americanized form of French or Swiss French Grisel ‘gray’ or of its rare variant Grizel.
English (Hertfordshire): nickname from Middle English (Old French) grisel ‘gray(-haired)’, also used as a term for an old man.

English: occasionally perhaps from the Middle English female personal name Grisil(d) (perhaps of ancient Germanic origin), but it is attested very rarely in medieval England and probably too late to be the source of a surname in the English Midlands. It was made familiar through the heroine of Chaucer's Clerk's Tale, a re-writing of an Italian folk tale in versions by Boccaccio and Petrarch, but the personal name is earlier than the publication of Chaucer's work.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Grizzell was born on 18 July 1632, in Pondisford, Somerset, England, her father, William Humphrey Grizzell, was 32 and her mother, Lucretia Christine Ripley, was 28. She married Robert Coleman in 1650, in Essex, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1700, in Charles City Point, Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 68, and was buried in Hanover, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Grizzell est née le 18 juillet 1632, à Pondisford, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, William Humphrey Grizzell, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lucretia Christine Ripley, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Coleman en 1650, à Essex, Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1700, à Charles City Point, Charles City County, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Hanover, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Grizzell am 18. Juli 1632 in Pondisford, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Humphrey Grizzell 32 und ihre Mutter Lucretia Christine Ripley 28. Sie hat 1650 in Essex, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Robert Coleman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1700 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Charles City Point, Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America und wurde in Hanover, Virginia, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Grizzell è nata il il 18 luglio 1632 nel Pondisford, Somerset, England, sua padre, William Humphrey Grizzell, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Lucretia Christine Ripley, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Robert Coleman nel 1650, nel Essex, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1700, nel Charles City Point, Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Hanover, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Grizzellが1632年7月18日にイギリスソメルセトポンディスフォードで生まれた時，父William Humphrey Grizzellは32歳，母Lucretia Christine Ripleyは28歳であった。1650年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州エセックスでRobert Colemanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1700年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州チャーレス シトイ コウントイチャーレス シトイ ポイントで68歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ハノバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Grizzell(이)가 1632년 7월 18일 영국 서머세트 폰디스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Humphrey Grizzell(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucretia Christine Ripley(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1650년 미국 버지니아 주 에세스에서 Robert Coleman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1700년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 찰스 시티 카운티 찰스 시티 포인트에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 핸버에 묻혔다.

pt.Rappanhannock,Essex,Virginia,USA: Essex, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Grizzell nasceu em 18 de julho de 1632, em Pondisford, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Humphrey Grizzell, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lucretia Christine Ripley, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Coleman em 1650, em Essex, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1700, em Charles City Point, Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Hanover, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Grizzell родилась 18 июля 1632 г. в местности пондисфорд, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени William Humphrey Grizzell было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lucretia Christine Ripley, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Coleman в 1650 г. в местности эссекс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1700 г. в местности чарльс сити поинт, чарльс сити коунти, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности хановир, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Grizzell nació el 18 de julio de 1632, en Pondisford, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, William Humphrey Grizzell, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lucretia Christine Ripley, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Robert Coleman en 1650, en Essex, Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1700, en Charles City Point, Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Hanover, Virginia, British Colonial America.
